data.name: MILFs of Sunville - Season 2
data.detailed_description:
A direct sequel to MILFs of Sunville.



Just recently, you dreamed of leaving this town, so what has changed?
Did you meet new people or got used to the coziness of a small, always sunny town?
Or maybe you got yourself in a ton of trouble and couldn't just run away, leaving things as they were?





Can't abandon the people who believed in you and run away from those you wronged?


One way or the other, but the protagonist will have to face the consequences of his actions in the new season of the game.
He'll change, for better, or for the worse.
And only you have the power to direct that change.




Explore the stories of characters you already know well and deal with the challenges yet to come in your own, unique style!

THE GAME FEATURES

  • More than 20 charming ladies and hot MILFs!
  • Lively characters with animated eyes
  • Flying camera inside animations with a variety of angles to choose
  • Love bar, to give more life to the spicy scenes
  • A fully-functional smartphone
  • An open world
  • 10-20 hours of gameplay
  • All of the graphics and music made without the use of AI

Early Access

This game is in Early Access.

Regular free updates will be provided to anyone who has already purchased the game.

data.short_description: MILFs of Sunville is an adult game about a young guy forced to leave his luxurious life in a big city behind and return to a college in a small town of Sunville. This is a VN, filled with beautiful girls, romance, moral choices mixed with quality graphics and hot close-up animations.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 波蘭文, 捷克文, 阿拉伯文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: Intel based or M1 under Rosetta
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS or Latest Ubuntu LTS
  • 處理器: Processor 64-bit quad core 1.6 Ghz (CPU or APU)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
